revision_summary: Four targeted fixes required: (1) MISCLASSIFICATION FIX — cherry_pick_moments[4] at 05:17 is classified as 'knowledge_gap' but the rep held scope correctly; reclassify as 'missed_appointment_pivot' and update the schema reference to setter_scope_discipline.universal_escape_hatch or curiosity_over_features. (2) HANDOFF BRIEF FIX — handoff_brief.applicable is marked false, but a conditional brief should be generated for the soft callback outcome: flag the unresolved motivation, the spouse-inclusion gap, the anomalous bill figure, and the customer's efficiency-minded framing as volatile context the closer needs if the callback converts. (3) MISSED MOMENTS — add cherry_pick entries for: (a) pre-call audio bleed at 00:17–00:29 (professionalism/intro discipline); (b) hedged townhome confirmation at 01:45 ('I do believe'); (c) program pitch delivered without emotional anchor at 04:16; (d) hidden-costs anxiety signal at 05:44 ('collision cost'). (4) TONE CORRECTION — remove 'credit confirmed' from coaching_focus[0].why; replace with 'credit self-reported above threshold (unverified per schema policy gap)' to avoid contradicting the schema's explicit uncertainty on stated vs pulled credit.
